Ball Bungees # Ball Bungees ![Ball Bungees 4 pack](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/71725aa4-a7d5-4c3a-b565-cc4931f30537.png) Product: Ball Bungees 4 pack Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 100) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Description](#1656d264-6a01-425f-93c0-478b3d11cdb4) * [Product Overview](#db2c08f6-04bc-4a3b-ac87-4e81db08f4b7) Make hanging your banners fast and secure with this 4-pack of 9-inch ball bungees from Banners.com, designed to thread easily through grommets and loop snugly around poles, frames, or posts. These economical, flexible ties help keep your banners taut and in place at events, storefronts, and outdoor displays with minimal effort. #### [Product Description](#product-descriptionCollapse) #### Ball Bungees Ball bungees are 9" and are the most economical and secure way to attach grommeted banners to banner frames, sign posts or poles. Slip the cord through the grommet, around a stationary object, over the ball and your display is ready. #### [Payment](#paymentCollapse) All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check). We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order. #### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse) #### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse) We offer the following shipping methods: \*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. Please note: all international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS, UPS, and FedEx. Contact a customer service rep today for more information \*\*\* Standard ( 3–5 Business Days ) Three Day ( 3 Business Days ) Two Day ( 2 Business Days ) Overnight ( 1 Business Day ) **Economy Shipping** If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. **International shipping Notes:** For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. ## Why Choose Banners.com? **Customer Service** Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. **Fast Turnaround** Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. **Quality Products** Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the l
